历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 4282 → 4903 → 6698 → 7564 → 7175, showing an overall backward trend. In 2024, it reached the maximum backward shift, and in 2025, it slightly recovered (ranking number decreased by about 389). Over the past 3 years, the cumulative backward shift is about 2477. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 7175. The university's enrollment plan in Liaoning for Physics Category was 59 in 2021, 75 in 2022, 79 in 2023, 86 in 2024, and 80 in 2025. In 2026, the Physics Category plan is 69, and the Medical Category plan is 13 (Medical Category is grouped into Physics group according to subject rules), totaling 82, a slight increase of 2 compared to 80 in 2025, an expansion of about 2.5%, which has limited impact on competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Ranking, it ranks 22nd on the main list, and has been stable in the 21st–22nd range in recent years, belonging to the top domestic universities. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly involving the lingering impact of the 2019 'study partner' incident. On Douyin, it ranks 20th in overall popularity (high heat), with high short video exposure, maintaining high application attention. From 2022 to 2024, there were abnormal signals in admission scores (e.g., a break in Shaanxi, a 63-point drop in Sichuan science admission line), but the ranking recovery in Liaoning in 2025 indicates limited negative impact in Liaoning. Mathematics A+ (flagship discipline, corresponding to Mathematics major), Chinese Language and Literature A, Marxist Theory A, Control Science and Engineering A, Foreign Language and Literature A, Clinical Medicine A-, etc. There are 19 disciplines rated A- or above, with strong disciplinary strength, which strongly attracts applications to related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and Automation have been consistently highly recommended from 2024 to 2026. Clinical Medicine and Stomatology remain relatively popular. Mathematics/Statistics majors have seen increased recommendation. The number of Physics Category candidates in the province was 103,000 in 2021 → 143,000 in 2025, showing an increasing trend. In 2026, total candidates are about 200,000, with Physics Category accounting for about 72%, estimated at about 144,000, roughly the same as 2025. Shandong University is located in Shandong Province, which is in the same northern region as Liaoning, with moderate geographical distance and no obvious regional preference bias. The university's enrollment proportion in Liaoning (in enrollment_summary, 51 in Liaoning in 2025 accounts for 8.5%) is at a medium level, not a major source province.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the overall backward trend of historical rankings, the slight expansion of 2.5% in the 2026 plan, the basically stable number of local candidates, the slightly negative reputation but high Douyin popularity, and the prominent advantageous disciplines, based on the 2025 baseline of 7175, the minimum admission ranking for 2026 is expected to slightly shift backward to about 7333, with a range of 6833–7833.

- Computer Science and Technology
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:

- Automation (Automation, Robotics Engineering)
- Electrical Engineering and Automation (included in Energy and Power)

- Cyberspace Security / Cryptography Science and Technology
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Materials (Advanced Materials and Intelligent Molding)
- Chemistry (Chemistry)
- Biological Sciences (Biological Science, Biotechnology, Ecology, Bioengineering)
- Intelligent Construction and Smart Transportation
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 6833–7833, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (<6833), you can focus on flagship majors like Mathematics. If your ranking is close to the upper limit (>7833), prioritize Tier 3 majors as safety and be cautious with Tier 1 majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum admission rankings for Shandong University's medical category in Liaoning Province over the past five years are: 2021: 3874 (planned 3 students), 2022: 19817 (planned 16 students, significant expansion led to a sharp drop in ranking), 2023: 16434 (planned 15 students), 2024: 16329 (planned 13 students), 2025: 15246 (planned 13 students). In 2022, due to the expansion of the enrollment plan from 3 to 16 students, the ranking dropped significantly; thereafter, the plan gradually stabilized at 13-15 students, and the ranking showed a continuous recovery trend (the ranking numbers decreased year by year from 2023 to 2024 to 2025), indicating that the popularity of medical applications has been increasing year by year. The 2026 medical enrollment plan is 13 students, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or reduction.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Shandong University is a national key university directly under the Ministry of Education, ranked among the national 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction universities, with strong comprehensive strength. Its medical disciplines originated from the Qilu Medical College of Shandong University, with a long history of running schools and profound academic accumulation. Majors such as Clinical Medicine and Stomatology enjoy a high reputation nationwide and have a sustained appeal to Liaoning candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Medical majors have always been a popular direction for college entrance examinations, with fierce competition in majors such as Clinical Medicine and Stomatology. Shandong University is located in Jinan City, Shandong Province, with a superior geographical location and convenient transportation, making it a high-quality choice outside the province for Liaoning candidates. In recent years, the overall popularity of medical applications has continued to rise, coupled with the outstanding strength of Shandong University's medical disciplines, it is expected that the willingness of Liaoning candidates to apply in 2026 will not diminish.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the above factors, the minimum admission ranking for Shandong University's medical category in Liaoning Province in 2026 is expected to be around 15046, a slight increase of about 200 places compared to 2025 (15246), with slightly intensified competition. The fluctuation range is expected to be between 14745 and 15347.

Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Clinical Medicine (Qilu Medical College Innovation Experimental Class)
- Clinical Medicine (5+3 Integrated Program)
- Stomatology (5+3 Integrated Program)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2, use Tier 1 as a reach, and Tier 3 as a safety.
